emails.subject: Re: HILCORP old ocean volume
emails.body: Well- I have officially NOT heard from Hilcorp after numerous voice and email messages. Please plan to have the gas rerouted back down the valley line for the Dec 1 forward. Call if you have any questions- Daren J Farmer 11/21/2000 10:08 AM
